baseline.description: No bench constraint check — agent commits freely to any staffing request. Baseline provided by program staff.

your_method.description: Hard constraint policy — agent checks bench_summary.json before any staffing commitment. Escalates to delivery lead when capacity unconfirmed.

soft_warning.description: Soft warning variant — agent commits to staffing but adds caveat: subject to confirmation. Does not escalate.

delta_b.note: Hard constraint outperforms soft warning by 1.0pp. Soft warning preserves commitment language which still triggers bench_over_commitment failures.

delta_c.description: your_method minus published tau2-bench retail reference (~42%)
delta_c.note: Informational only. 30.67pp above published reference. Baseline model (qwen3-next-80b) is stronger than models used in published leaderboard.
